news.headline: Form 144: RPID affiliate notifies sale of 10,000 Class A shares (option exercise)
news.summary: Small insider sale via option exercise; prior sales noted on Jun 10, Jun 22 and Jul 1.

news.headline: Q1 2026: revenue $8.0M (+11% YoY) beats forecast, EPS -$0.31 misses; Q2 guided to ~$7.8M
news.summary: Growth-Detect system placements driving recurring consumables; FY26 consensus ~$39M (+17%).

news.headline: Underwritten public offering: ~$9.8M gross proceeds
news.summary: Balance-sheet top-up; dilution priced near then-market. Watch cash runway commentary at Q2.

catalysts.label: Q2 2026 earnings (est. early/mid August)
catalysts.detail: Historically reports Q2 in early-to-mid August (Aug 4 in 2023, Aug 12 in 2025). Guided ~$7.8M revenue; watch new Growth Direct placements, consumables pull-through and cash runway after the May raise.

pulse: Fresh position (Jul 14-15 buys ~$2.11 avg). Micro-cap automation play in pharma QC: Growth Direct systems seed recurring consumables/service revenue (~+11% YoY, FY26 consensus ~$39M, +17%). Story hinges on placement cadence and narrowing cash burn; May's ~$9.8M raise buys time but keeps dilution in the picture.
